37.sourceTitle: CoreCap Valve Cap Set - BBB Cycling
37.evidenceText: The source mentions a "Spare parts" section exists on the product page, but the complete spare parts listing details are not included in the provided content excerpt.
37.extractionRationale: The evidence references that spare parts are available but does not provide the actual count or list of distinct SKUs for valve cores, seals, o-rings, and replacement kits. The full spare parts section content is not present in the provided text.

41.sourceTitle: Lezyne's CLIK Valve-compatible pumps make tyre inflation easier than ever - Cycling News | Bike Reviews | road.cc
41.evidenceText: The complete CLIK Valve solution: with Lezyne Schwalbe CLIK Valve Cores, a Lezyne ABS Pro CLIK Chuck, and a bike valve core tool – which is required to replace your existing valves – you have everything you need to convert your current old-school Presta system
41.extractionRationale: The source discusses CLIK Valve technology and pump compatibility but does not contain information about specific bicycle/wheelset brands adopting CLIK in 2026 or continuing use in 2027. No brand adoption data or model year comparisons are provided in the evidence.

45.evidenceText: All DT Swiss wheelsets are tubeless compatible and the ASM versions come tubeless ready, equipped with tubeless tape and valves. The DT Swiss tubeless valve perfectly matches DT Swiss rims, to ensure a perfect seal
45.extractionRationale: Evidence shows DT Swiss uses their own proprietary tubeless valve system, not Clik valve. No sources mention Clik valve adoption by any major brands (DT Swiss, Mavic, Hunt, Zipp, ENVE, Roval). Therefore, 0% of major brands have converted to Clik valve standard.

57.evidenceText: Product listings show CoreCap products available on BIKE24 with no stock-out or restock delay information mentioned
57.extractionRationale: No evidence of stock-out or restock delays found in any source. Product pages appear to be active listings suggesting current availability. Per instructions, if product is currently available, return 0 (no restock delay). Low confidence due to lack of explicit stock status confirmation in the provided evidence.
